impacts.description: Contribution to achieving open strategic autonomy in digital and emerging enabling technologies, as defined by the Destination framing of the cluster under which this call is issued.
Contribution to the Apply AI Strategy objectives by advancing next-generation AI agent capabilities for deployment in real-world application sectors.

Deployment of validated AI agent results via the European Digital Innovation Hubs (EDIHs), contributing to adoption across economic sectors including healthcare, advanced manufacturing, and in-vehicle autonomous driving.

Technological advancement in AI agent capabilities from TRL 2 (technology concept formulated) to TRL 5 (technology validated in relevant environment), demonstrating readiness for further development toward deployment.
Communicable research results made available to the European R&D community through the AI-on-demand platform, advancing shared scientific knowledge and supporting open science objectives.

Cohesion with the European Partnership on AI, Data and Robotics (ADRA) and the GenAI4EU central Hub, contributing to coordinated European AI research efforts and the goals of the co-programmed ADRA partnership.
